document: Dealer/Service Center Dimension: Captures detailed dealer and service center information including location, contact details, organizational hierarchy, sales and service ownership, and dealer categorization. This table serves as the master reference for all dealer-related attributes across service operations.

join_guidance.description: Use this join to analyze service operations by dealer location, including service volumes, revenue, and customer satisfaction metrics per dealer.

document: Customer Verbatim/Comments: Stores customer-reported issues and service requests in their own words, along with standardized verbatim codes and groupings. This table captures the voice of customer at the time of service request and helps in categorizing common service issues and complaints.

join_guidance.description: Mandatory join to connect customer-reported issues with the corresponding repair order details for comprehensive service analysis.

document: Vehicle Model Master: Contains master data for vehicle models including model codes, descriptions, variants, fuel types, transmission types, seating capacity, and product divisions. This table serves as the reference for vehicle specifications and attributes across all service transactions.

join_guidance.description: Use this join to analyze service patterns, common issues, and repair costs by vehicle model, variant, and specifications.

document: Repair Order Header: Central transaction table capturing repair order information including order dates, vehicle details, odometer readings, billing amounts, service advisor assignments, warranty status, and order status. This table represents the core service transaction record and serves as the primary entry point for all service-related analysis.

join_guidance.description: Use this join to enrich repair orders with dealer location and organizational hierarchy information for regional performance analysis.
Use this join to analyze repair orders by vehicle model attributes for model-specific service trends and issues.
Mandatory join to access labor line items associated with each repair order for detailed labor cost and productivity analysis.
Mandatory join to access parts line items associated with each repair order for parts consumption and inventory analysis.
Use this join to analyze customer-reported issues and their relationship to repair actions, parts replaced, and labor performed.

document: Repair Order Labour Details: Line-item details of labor services performed during a repair order, including labor codes, descriptions, standard hours, charged hours, labor rates, taxes, and discounts. This table enables detailed analysis of service productivity, labor utilization, and revenue from service operations.

join_guidance.description: Mandatory join to associate labor line items with their parent repair order for header-level context and aggregations.

document: Repair Order Parts Details: Line-item details of parts consumed during a repair order, including part codes, descriptions, quantities, pricing, taxes, discounts, and landed costs. This table supports parts inventory analysis, warranty parts tracking, and profitability analysis of service operations at the part level.

join_guidance.description: Mandatory join to associate parts line items with their parent repair order for header-level context and aggregations.
